scripts.build:contracts: bun run --cwd packages/contracts clean && bun run --cwd packages/contracts build
scripts.build:contracts:npm: npm run --prefix packages/contracts clean && npm install --prefix packages/contracts --include=dev && npm run --prefix packages/contracts build
scripts.build: bun run build:contracts && bun run build:web
scripts.cf:build: bun run build:contracts && bun run --cwd apps/web cf:build
scripts.cf:deploy:staging: cd apps/web && npx wrangler deploy --env staging --config wrangler.toml
scripts.cf:deploy:prod: cd apps/web && npx wrangler deploy --env production --dry-run --outdir .open-next/deploy && node scripts/patch-bundle-require.cjs && OPEN_NEXT_DEPLOY=true npx wrangler deploy --env production --no-bundle --config wrangler.deploy.toml
